title: Software Update - DFU is not available if phone's battery is below 30%
scenario: DFU is blocked with low battery pop-up when phone battery is below 30% on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
2. Ensure the phone's battery level is below 30%.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Tap on Firmware Update or Language Change option.
expected: A pop-up appears stating the device battery doesn't have enough power to update. The user can tap OK to dismiss the pop-up and remain on the Settings page without the DFU starting.
